TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Ciang
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: aiza tacini uvaaza tupaun tu Dahu'ikit.
S.PHON: aiða taʨini uvaaða tupaun tu dax~χuʔikit.
S.FORM: aiza tacini uvaaza tupaun tu Dahu'ikit.
S.PHON: aiða taʨini uvaaða tupaun tu dax~χuʔikit.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩,叫小Dahu.
There is a child called Little Dahu.

S.FORM: a saia hai aizaan tu tasa mas asu tupaun tu Kulu.
S.PHON: a saia x~χai aiðaan tu tasa mas asu tupaun tu kul~ɬu.
S.FORM: a saia hai aizaan tu tasa mas asu tupaun tu Kulu.
S.PHON: a saia x~χai aiðaan tu tasa mas asu tupaun tu kul~ɬu.
S.TRANSL: 他呢,有一隻叫Kulu的狗.
He has a dog called Kulu.

S.FORM: naia hai saipuk mas a sisiuh tu tasa mapingadah sia pan.
S.PHON: naia x~χai saipuk mas a ɕiɕiux~χ tu tasa mapiŋadax~χ ɕia pan.
S.FORM: naia hai saipuk mas a sisiuh tu tasa mapingadah sia pan.
S.PHON: naia x~χai saipuk mas a ɕiɕiux~χ tu tasa mapiŋadax~χ ɕia pan.
S.TRANSL: 他們養了一隻青蛙放在瓶子裡面.
They are keeping a frog, which was put inside a bottle.

S.FORM: haitu masa masabah a maza Dahu'ikita hai a maza isaicia sinaipuka sisiuha sisiuha hai nadadu a kaivakaiva is'aang tu mavik tu ka pingadahuncin isa naak a ai pasunkavaizan at.
S.PHON: x~χaitu masa masabax~χ a maða dax~χuʔikita x~χai a maða isaiʨia ɕinaipuka ɕiɕiux~χa ɕiɕiux~χa x~χai nadadu a kaivakaiva isʔaaŋ tu mavik tu ka piŋadax~χunʨin isa naak a ai pasunkavaiðan at.
S.FORM: haitu masa masabah a maza Dahu'ikita hai a maza isaicia sinaipuka sisiuha sisiuha hai nadadu a kaivakaiva is'aang tu mavik tu ka pingadahuncin isa naak a ai pasunkavaizan at.
S.PHON: x~χaitu masa masabax~χ a maða dax~χuʔikita x~χai a maða isaiʨia ɕinaipuka ɕiɕiux~χa ɕiɕiux~χa x~χai nadadu a kaivakaiva isʔaaŋ tu mavik tu ka piŋadax~χunʨin isa naak a ai pasunkavaiðan at.
S.TRANSL: 但是,當那個小Dahu在睡覺,他養的那隻青蛙在著急為何他被鎖在裡面,想知道他的玩伴在哪裡.
When little Dahu is sleeping, the frog he kept is worrying and wondering why he was put inside and where his buddies are.

W.TRANSL: 使役-在-裡面-受焦=近距.斜格

S.FORM: macisbai a saia tudii maisisia pancia mun'apav.
S.PHON: maʨisbai a saia tudii maiɕiɕia panʨia munʔapav.
S.FORM: macisbai a saia tudii maisisia pancia mun'apav.
S.PHON: maʨisbai a saia tudii maiɕiɕia panʨia munʔapav.
S.TRANSL: 他從瓶子出來逃跑了.
He comes out of the bottle and runs away.

S.FORM: ciang tau ce pian.
S.PHON: ʨiaŋ tau ʨ* pian.
S.FORM: ciang tau ce pian.
S.PHON: ʨiaŋ tau ʨ* pian.
S.TRANSL: 講到這邊.
Until here.

S.FORM: at mazasia Dahu'ikita masa minkailasin saia tu 'um'um hai saduas saicia hai ukin adii sisiuh'ikita macisbaiin.
S.PHON: at maðaɕia dax~χuʔikita masa minkail~ɬaɕin saia tu ʔumʔum x~χai saduas saiʨia x~χai ukin adii ɕiɕiux~χʔikita maʨisbaiin.
S.FORM: at mazasia Dahu'ikita masa minkailasin saia tu 'um'um hai saduas saicia hai ukin adii sisiuh'ikita macisbaiin.
S.PHON: at maðaɕia dax~χuʔikita masa minkail~ɬaɕin saia tu ʔumʔum x~χai saduas saiʨia x~χai ukin adii ɕiɕiux~χʔikita maʨisbaiin.
S.TRANSL: 當小Dahu清晨醒來,看到他的小青蛙不見了,他跑掉了.
When Little Dahu wakes up early in the morning, he sees that his pet frog is gone. It ran off.

W.TRANSL: 變成-生氣勃勃=改變狀態

S.FORM: ungat kilimun saicia maza isaicia kucu tu tungnangadah dii hai ka uka.
S.PHON: uŋat kil~ɬimun saiʨia maða isaiʨia kuʨu tu tuŋnaŋadax~χ dii x~χai ka uka.
S.FORM: ungat kilimun saicia maza isaicia kucu tu tungnangadah dii hai ka uka.
S.PHON: uŋat kil~ɬimun saiʨia maða isaiʨia kuʨu tu tuŋnaŋadax~χ dii x~χai ka uka.
S.TRANSL: 他找找看牠是不是躲在他的鞋子裡面,可是沒有.
Then he seeks if it is hiding inside his shoes, but it is not.

S.FORM: at mazasia adiia a Kulu hai ungadahun saicia maza bungu sia pan saak tu isa maza sisiuh hai.
S.PHON: at maðaɕia adiia a kul~ɬu x~χai uŋadax~χun saiʨia maða buŋu ɕia pan saak tu isa maða ɕiɕiux~χ x~χai.
S.FORM: at mazasia adiia a Kulu hai ungadahun saicia maza bungu sia pan saak tu isa maza sisiuh hai.
S.PHON: at maðaɕia adiia a kul~ɬu x~χai uŋadax~χun saiʨia maða buŋu ɕia pan saak tu isa maða ɕiɕiux~χ x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 那個Kulu把頭放在瓶子裡面,聞聞看青蛙在哪裡.
That Kulu gets his head inside the bottle, smelling and looking for the frog.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: uka.
S.PHON: uka.
S.FORM: uka.
S.PHON: uka.
S.TRANSL: 不在.
No.

S.FORM: ungat mazasia Kulu hai a minasian naia sia siul kilim mas sisiuhcia.
S.PHON: uŋat maðaɕia kul~ɬu x~χai a minaɕian naia ɕia ɕiul~ɬ kil~ɬim mas ɕiɕiux~χʨia.
S.FORM: ungat mazasia Kulu hai a minasian naia sia siul kilim mas sisiuhcia.
S.PHON: uŋat maðaɕia kul~ɬu x~χai a minaɕian naia ɕia ɕiul~ɬ kil~ɬim mas ɕiɕiux~χʨia.
S.TRANSL: 然後Kulu他們從窗戶找青蛙.
Then with Kulu, together they look for the frog from the window.

S.FORM: haitu maza pana hai adasus asucia madaidaza isnanastu.
S.PHON: x~χaitu maða pana x~χai adasus asuʨia madaidaða isnanastu.
S.FORM: haitu maza pana hai adasus asucia madaidaza isnanastu.
S.PHON: x~χaitu maða pana x~χai adasus asuʨia madaidaða isnanastu.
S.TRANSL: 狗帶著瓶子掉到地上.
The dog brings the bottle down to the ground.

S.FORM: panpulaz a pana.
S.PHON: panpul~ɬað a pana.
S.FORM: panpulaz a pana.
S.PHON: panpul~ɬað a pana.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子破了.
The bottle breaks.

S.FORM: at damuun a maza adiia Kulua mas Dahu'ikitcia kalaun tu nuazhau tu ka pulazun a pana.
S.PHON: at damuun a maða adiia kul~ɬua mas dax~χuʔikitʨia kal~ɬaun tu nuaðx~χau tu ka pul~ɬaðun a pana.
S.FORM: at damuun a maza adiia Kulua mas Dahu'ikitcia kalaun tu nuazhau tu ka pulazun a pana.
S.PHON: at damuun a maða adiia kul~ɬua mas dax~χuʔikitʨia kal~ɬaun tu nuaðx~χau tu ka pul~ɬaðun a pana.
S.TRANSL: 小Dahu把Kulu抓起來,責怪他為什麼把瓶子弄破.
Little Dahu takes Kulu up, blaming it for breaking the bottle.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: ungat kunata naia tandusas isaicia tu a Kulucia kikilim mas sinaipuk tu sisiuhcia.
S.PHON: uŋat kunata naia tandusas isaiʨia tu a kul~ɬuʨia kikil~ɬim mas ɕinaipuk tu ɕiɕiux~χʨia.
S.FORM: ungat kunata naia tandusas isaicia tu a Kulucia kikilim mas sinaipuk tu sisiuhcia.
S.PHON: uŋat kunata naia tandusas isaiʨia tu a kul~ɬuʨia kikil~ɬim mas ɕinaipuk tu ɕiɕiux~χʨia.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們兩個,和他的Kulu,到外面去繼續找所養的青蛙.
Then the two of them, with his Kulu, go outside and keep on looking for the frog they kept.

S.FORM: lala'laun naicia uka antalam.
S.PHON: l~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaun naiʨia uka antal~ɬam.
S.FORM: lala'laun naicia uka antalam.
S.PHON: l~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaun naiʨia uka antal~ɬam.
S.TRANSL: 他們一直叫他.沒有回音.
They keep calling for him. No answers.

S.FORM: ungat maza Dahu'ikita hai a kilimun saicia adiia lalaaka tu.
S.PHON: uŋat maða dax~χuʔikita x~χai a kil~ɬimun saiʨia adiia l~ɬal~ɬaaka tu.
S.FORM: ungat maza Dahu'ikita hai a kilimun saicia adiia lalaaka tu.
S.PHON: uŋat maða dax~χuʔikita x~χai a kil~ɬimun saiʨia adiia l~ɬal~ɬaaka tu.
S.TRANSL: 然後,那個小Dahu,他檢查那個洞看小青蛙是否在裡面.
Then, that Little Dahu, he looks in that hole to check if the little frog went inside it.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: kungadahcia maza sisiuh'ikita haitu adiia Kulua hai ka saia ka asa mapahainan mas avadiia pahusaza idadaza sia lukiscia.
S.PHON: kuŋadax~χʨia maða ɕiɕiux~χʔikita x~χaitu adiia kul~ɬua x~χai ka saia ka asa mapax~χainan mas avadiia pax~χusaða idadaða ɕia l~ɬukisʨia.
S.FORM: kungadahcia maza sisiuh'ikita haitu adiia Kulua hai ka saia ka asa mapahainan mas avadiia pahusaza idadaza sia lukiscia.
S.PHON: kuŋadax~χʨia maða ɕiɕiux~χʔikita x~χaitu adiia kul~ɬua x~χai ka saia ka asa mapax~χainan mas avadiia pax~χusaða idadaða ɕia l~ɬukisʨia.
S.TRANSL: 但是Kulu想要和在那棵樹上的虎頭蜂玩耍.
But that Kulu wants to play with the hornets on that tree.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格
AV-可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: hai izaus saicia mazasia adiia lukisa mavuvuhvuh.
S.PHON: x~χai iðaus saiʨia maðaɕia adiia l~ɬukisa mavuvux~χvux~χ.
S.FORM: hai izaus saicia mazasia adiia lukisa mavuvuhvuh.
S.PHON: x~χai iðaus saiʨia maðaɕia adiia l~ɬukisa mavuvux~χvux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他把那個樹搖來搖去.
He is holding onto that tree and shaking it.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: at mazasia Dahu'ikita hai a masa kikilim sisiuh sia lalaakcia hai munapav tabukaza tu dii.
S.PHON: at maðaɕia dax~χuʔikita x~χai a masa kikil~ɬim ɕiɕiux~χ ɕia l~ɬal~ɬaakʨia x~χai munapav tabukaða tu dii.
S.FORM: at mazasia Dahu'ikita hai a masa kikilim sisiuh sia lalaakcia hai munapav tabukaza tu dii.
S.PHON: at maðaɕia dax~χuʔikita x~χai a masa kikil~ɬim ɕiɕiux~χ ɕia l~ɬal~ɬaakʨia x~χai munapav tabukaða tu dii.
S.TRANSL: 然後當小Dahu在樹洞裡找的時候,一個田鼠出來了.
A vole comes out when that Little Dahu is looking for the frog in that hole.

S.FORM: haitu mazasia asu hai acimanuun saicia maza a sias pahusaza mavuvuhvuh hai muhalhal a pahusaz at.
S.PHON: x~χaitu maðaɕia asu x~χai aʨimanuun saiʨia maða a ɕias pax~χusaða mavuvux~χvux~χ x~χai mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ a pax~χusað at.
S.FORM: haitu mazasia asu hai acimanuun saicia maza a sias pahusaza mavuvuhvuh hai muhalhal a pahusaz at.
S.PHON: x~χaitu maðaɕia asu x~χai aʨimanuun saiʨia maða a ɕias pax~χusaða mavuvux~χvux~χ x~χai mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ a pax~χusað at.
S.TRANSL: 但是那個狗在用力搖虎頭蜂窩.他一直搖,虎頭蜂就掉下來.
However, that dog is shaking the hornets powerfully. It keeps on shaking, the hornet's nest falls down.

S.FORM: a mazasia adiia Dahu'ikita hai undazaus sia lukis tu udadazacia mazasia sisiuh maicisbaia.
S.PHON: a maðaɕia adiia dax~χuʔikita x~χai undaðaus ɕia l~ɬukis tu udadaðaʨia maðaɕia ɕiɕiux~χ maiʨisbaia.
S.FORM: a mazasia adiia Dahu'ikita hai undazaus sia lukis tu udadazacia mazasia sisiuh maicisbaia.
S.PHON: a maðaɕia adiia dax~χuʔikita x~χai undaðaus ɕia l~ɬukis tu udadaðaʨia maðaɕia ɕiɕiux~χ maiʨisbaia.
S.TRANSL: 那個小Dahu爬到樹上,看青蛙有沒有逃到樹上.
That Little Dahu climbs on the tree, wondering if the frog ran off onto the tree.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格
移去-重疊-上面=遠距.斜格
主焦<完成貌>脫逃=遠距.主格

S.FORM: haitu a mazasia asua upa izaus saicia maza a pahusaza mavuhvuh mahalhal hai panpuszak mazasia pahusaz hai maciskun amin a masinap mas asucia nakalat kalat saicia.
S.PHON: x~χaitu a maðaɕia asua upa iðaus saiʨia maða a pax~χusaða mavux~χvux~χ max~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ x~χai panpusðak maðaɕia pax~χusað x~χai maʨiskun amin a maɕinap mas asuʨia nakal~ɬat kal~ɬat saiʨia.
S.FORM: haitu a mazasia asua upa izaus saicia maza a pahusaza mavuhvuh mahalhal hai panpuszak mazasia pahusaz hai maciskun amin a masinap mas asucia nakalat kalat saicia.
S.PHON: x~χaitu a maðaɕia asua upa iðaus saiʨia maða a pax~χusaða mavux~χvux~χ max~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ x~χai panpusðak maðaɕia pax~χusað x~χai maʨiskun amin a maɕinap mas asuʨia nakal~ɬat kal~ɬat saiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 狗狗那邊呢,蜂窩被他弄掉了,所有的虎頭蜂散開來追著他咬.
As for the dog, the nest is dropped down by the dog, and all the hornets spread out, chasing and biting the dog.

S.FORM: ungat a mazasia mabananaza at mazasia Dahu'ikita hai a cisdadaan saia tu diip a macisbai tungnadaza sia lukis.
S.PHON: uŋat a maðaɕia mabananaða at maðaɕia dax~χuʔikita x~χai a ʨisdadaan saia tu diip a maʨisbai tuŋnadaða ɕia l~ɬukis.
S.FORM: ungat a mazasia mabananaza at mazasia Dahu'ikita hai a cisdadaan saia tu diip a macisbai tungnadaza sia lukis.
S.PHON: uŋat a maðaɕia mabananaða at maðaɕia dax~χuʔikita x~χai a ʨisdadaan saia tu diip a maʨisbai tuŋnadaða ɕia l~ɬukis.
S.TRANSL: 然後小Dahu逃到樹上藏起來.
Then Little Dahu runs away to hide into the tree.

S.FORM: talidikus saia sia a lukiscia malala'la mas kilimun saicia tu a sisiuhcia.
S.PHON: tal~ɬidikus saia ɕia a l~ɬukisʨia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mas kil~ɬimun saiʨia tu a ɕiɕiux~χʨia.
S.FORM: talidikus saia sia a lukiscia malala'la mas kilimun saicia tu a sisiuhcia.
S.PHON: tal~ɬidikus saia ɕia a l~ɬukisʨia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mas kil~ɬimun saiʨia tu a ɕiɕiux~χʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他扶著樹,一直叫那個他找的青蛙.
He grips the tree, keeping on shouting out for the frog he is looking for.

S.FORM: haitu maza talidikusan a lukisa hai kaz hangsia ka vaha tu takismuut tu hanvang.
S.PHON: x~χaitu maða tal~ɬidikusan a l~ɬukisa x~χai kað x~χaŋɕia ka vax~χa tu takismuut tu x~χanvaŋ.
S.FORM: haitu maza talidikusan a lukisa hai kaz hangsia ka vaha tu takismuut tu hanvang.
S.PHON: x~χaitu maða tal~ɬidikusan a l~ɬukisa x~χai kað x~χaŋɕia ka vax~χa tu takismuut tu x~χanvaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 但是他抓的地方原來是野鹿角.
But that place where he is holding the tree, it turns out to be the antlers of a wild deer.

S.FORM: macisha adiia hanvanga mindangkaz aupa cinhuza.
S.PHON: maʨisx~χa adiia x~χanvaŋa mindaŋkað aupa ʨinx~χuða.
S.FORM: macisha adiia hanvanga mindangkaz aupa cinhuza.
S.PHON: maʨisx~χa adiia x~χanvaŋa mindaŋkað aupa ʨinx~χuða.
S.TRANSL: 因為嚇到了,那頭鹿突然站起來.
Suddenly the deer stands up because it was startled.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: anvahaus saicia mazasia Dahu'ikita tisdadaan mai'aupasia vahlas.
S.PHON: anvax~χaus saiʨia maðaɕia dax~χuʔikita tisdadaan maiʔaupaɕia vax~χl~ɬas.
S.FORM: anvahaus saicia mazasia Dahu'ikita tisdadaan mai'aupasia vahlas.
S.PHON: anvax~χaus saiʨia maðaɕia dax~χuʔikita tisdadaan maiʔaupaɕia vax~χl~ɬas.
S.TRANSL: 他把小Dahu放在角上,往河跑過去.
He puts Little Dahu on his antlers and runs off toward the river.

S.FORM: ungat taunasianin sia silavahlas hai.
S.PHON: uŋat taunaɕianin ɕia ɕil~ɬavax~χl~ɬas x~χai.
S.FORM: ungat taunasianin sia silavahlas hai.
S.PHON: uŋat taunaɕianin ɕia ɕil~ɬavax~χl~ɬas x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們就到了河邊.
Then they get to the river bank.

W.TRANSL: 到達-處隔.中距=改變狀態

S.FORM: halhalus saicia Dahu'ikita ungat maza luhia hai kanbiskavan amin saicia.
S.PHON: x~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬus saiʨia dax~χuʔikita uŋat maða l~ɬux~χia x~χai kanbiskavan amin saiʨia.
S.FORM: halhalus saicia Dahu'ikita ungat maza luhia hai kanbiskavan amin saicia.
S.PHON: x~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬus saiʨia dax~χuʔikita uŋat maða l~ɬux~χia x~χai kanbiskavan amin saiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他丟小Dahu,然後也把小狗踢走了.
He tosses Little Dahu off, and then kicks that small dog off.

S.FORM: a mahalhal lanangadah maza Dahu'ikita mas adii tu Kulucia sia a vahlas tu danumcia.
S.PHON: a max~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ l~ɬanaŋadax~χ maða dax~χuʔikita mas adii tu kul~ɬuʨia ɕia a vax~χl~ɬas tu danumʨia.
S.FORM: a mahalhal lanangadah maza Dahu'ikita mas adii tu Kulucia sia a vahlas tu danumcia.
S.PHON: a max~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ l~ɬanaŋadax~χ maða dax~χuʔikita mas adii tu kul~ɬuʨia ɕia a vax~χl~ɬas tu danumʨia.
S.TRANSL: 小Dahu和Kulu掉到河水裡面.
Little Dahu and Kulu drop into the water of the river.

S.FORM: ungat izaun mas Dahu'ikitcia mazasia Kulua ivahlascia ansahan kusisila.
S.PHON: uŋat iðaun mas dax~χuʔikitʨia maðaɕia kul~ɬua ivax~χl~ɬasʨia ansax~χan kuɕiɕil~ɬa.
S.FORM: ungat izaun mas Dahu'ikitcia mazasia Kulua ivahlascia ansahan kusisila.
S.PHON: uŋat iðaun mas dax~χuʔikitʨia maðaɕia kul~ɬua ivax~χl~ɬasʨia ansax~χan kuɕiɕil~ɬa.
S.TRANSL: 然後在河裡,小Dahu把Kule抓起來,扛到河邊.
Then, in the water, Little Dahu takes Kulu up and carries it to the riverbank.

S.FORM: at tupaus Dahu'ikitcia mazasia Kulua kunias ima mapishaiap tu haiapa pataliva kaa tu matahusngi.
S.PHON: at tupaus dax~χuʔikitʨia maðaɕia kul~ɬua kunias ima mapisx~χaiap tu x~χaiapa patal~ɬiva kaa tu matax~χusŋi.
S.FORM: at tupaus Dahu'ikitcia mazasia Kulua kunias ima mapishaiap tu haiapa pataliva kaa tu matahusngi.
S.PHON: at tupaus dax~χuʔikitʨia maðaɕia kul~ɬua kunias ima mapisx~χaiap tu x~χaiapa patal~ɬiva kaa tu matax~χusŋi.
S.TRANSL: 小Dahu用手勢告訴Kulu,讓他安靜不要吵鬧.
Little Dahu tells Kulu with a gesture to be quite and not make any noise.

S.FORM: ungat isia naia sia taunasianin sia silas lukiscia hai.
S.PHON: uŋat iɕia naia ɕia taunaɕianin ɕia ɕil~ɬas l~ɬukisʨia x~χai.
S.FORM: ungat isia naia sia taunasianin sia silas lukiscia hai.
S.PHON: uŋat iɕia naia ɕia taunaɕianin ɕia ɕil~ɬas l~ɬukisʨia x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們到達了河邊的樹.
Then they arrived at the trees by the shore.

W.TRANSL: 到達-處格.中距=改變狀態

S.FORM: tuhnaun mas Dahu'ikitcia maza Kulua maku'unis ima mapishaiap tu haiapa kaa tu.
S.PHON: tux~χnaun mas dax~χuʔikitʨia maða kul~ɬua makuʔunis ima mapisx~χaiap tu x~χaiapa kaa tu.
S.FORM: tuhnaun mas Dahu'ikitcia maza Kulua maku'unis ima mapishaiap tu haiapa kaa tu.
S.PHON: tux~χnaun mas dax~χuʔikitʨia maða kul~ɬua makuʔunis ima mapisx~χaiap tu x~χaiapa kaa tu.
S.TRANSL: "要記得,不要"
"Remember, don't!"

S.FORM: a.
S.PHON: a.
S.FORM: a.
S.PHON: a.
S.TRANSL: 啊
Ah

S.FORM: lulunglung kaa tu matahusngi naminsuma pahusaza ungtu kalat mamita.
S.PHON: l~ɬul~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ kaa tu matax~χusŋi naminsuma pax~χusaða uŋtu kal~ɬat mamita.
S.FORM: lulunglung kaa tu matahusngi naminsuma pahusaza ungtu kalat mamita.
S.PHON: l~ɬul~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ kaa tu matax~χusŋi naminsuma pax~χusaða uŋtu kal~ɬat mamita.
S.TRANSL: 小Dahu再一次跟Kulu說:「不要吠,不要吵鬧!不然虎頭蜂會來咬我們.」
Little Dahu tells Kulu again with a gesture: "Don't bark, don't be noisy, or the hornets will come and bite us!"

S.FORM: at idadaza naia sia lukiscia tudii islunghu.
S.PHON: at idadaða naia ɕia l~ɬukisʨia tudii isl~ɬuŋx~χu.
S.FORM: at idadaza naia sia lukiscia tudii islunghu.
S.PHON: at idadaða naia ɕia l~ɬukisʨia tudii isl~ɬuŋx~χu.
S.TRANSL: 他們就在樹上休息.
Then they are resting on the tree.

S.FORM: upa mais idadaza sia lukiscia hai nama'aipi naia a minhaliv mazasia a mahaliv a ungtu asua.
S.PHON: upa mais idadaða ɕia l~ɬukisʨia x~χai namaʔaipi naia a minx~χal~ɬiv maðaɕia a max~χal~ɬiv a uŋtu asua.
S.FORM: upa mais idadaza sia lukiscia hai nama'aipi naia a minhaliv mazasia a mahaliv a ungtu asua.
S.PHON: upa mais idadaða ɕia l~ɬukisʨia x~χai namaʔaipi naia a minx~χal~ɬiv maðaɕia a max~χal~ɬiv a uŋtu asua.
S.TRANSL: 因為如果他們在樹上,衣服和狗很快就會乾了.
Because if they are on the tree, their clothes and the dog will dry quickly.

S.FORM: haitu idadaza naia sia lukiscia hai saduan naicia tu at adii mazasia kikilimun mamita maza sia sisiuha.
S.PHON: x~χaitu idadaða naia ɕia l~ɬukisʨia x~χai saduan naiʨia tu at adii maðaɕia kikil~ɬimun mamita maða ɕia ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: haitu idadaza naia sia lukiscia hai saduan naicia tu at adii mazasia kikilimun mamita maza sia sisiuha.
S.PHON: x~χaitu idadaða naia ɕia l~ɬukisʨia x~χai saduan naiʨia tu at adii maðaɕia kikil~ɬimun mamita maða ɕia ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 但是,在木頭上他們能看到那隻我們一直在找的青蛙,正和別的青蛙在一起.
However, on the wood they can see the frog, which we are looking for, being together with other frogs.

S.FORM: maluskun mas a duma tu sisiuh ungat manaskaldaingaz a adiia.
S.PHON: mal~ɬuskun mas a duma tu ɕiɕiux~χ uŋat manaskal~ɬdaiŋað a adiia.
S.FORM: maluskun mas a duma tu sisiuh ungat manaskaldaingaz a adiia.
S.PHON: mal~ɬuskun mas a duma tu ɕiɕiux~χ uŋat manaskal~ɬdaiŋað a adiia.
S.TRANSL: 然後小Dahu超高興.
Then Little Dahu is very happy.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: manaskaldaingaz amin a ungtu isaicia asua Kulua.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬdaiŋað amin a uŋtu isaiʨia asua kul~ɬua.
S.FORM: manaskaldaingaz amin a ungtu isaicia asua Kulua.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬdaiŋað amin a uŋtu isaiʨia asua kul~ɬua.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗,Kulu,也很開心.
His dog, Kulu, is very happy too.

S.FORM: a inkaduan naicia sisiuha izaun naicia sisiuh izaus Dahu'ikitcia sisiuha madamu ansia ima.
S.PHON: a inkaduan naiʨia ɕiɕiux~χa iðaun naiʨia ɕiɕiux~χ iðaus dax~χuʔikitʨia ɕiɕiux~χa madamu anɕia ima.
S.FORM: a inkaduan naicia sisiuha izaun naicia sisiuh izaus Dahu'ikitcia sisiuha madamu ansia ima.
S.PHON: a inkaduan naiʨia ɕiɕiux~χa iðaun naiʨia ɕiɕiux~χ iðaus dax~χuʔikitʨia ɕiɕiux~χa madamu anɕia ima.
S.TRANSL: 他們找到了青蛙 ,小Dahu把青蛙放在手上帶回去.
They find the frog, and the frog is taken back by Little Dahu in his hand.

S.FORM: mudaan kulumah at.
S.PHON: mudaan kul~ɬumax~χ at.
S.FORM: mudaan kulumah at.
S.PHON: mudaan kul~ɬumax~χ at.
S.TRANSL: 他們離開回家.
They leave and go home.

S.FORM: pisaukan naicia mazasia a.
S.PHON: pisaukan naiʨia maðaɕia a.
S.FORM: pisaukan naicia mazasia a.
S.PHON: pisaukan naiʨia maðaɕia a.
S.TRANSL: 啊
Ah

S.FORM: mailuskun a sisiuha.
S.PHON: mail~ɬuskun a ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: mailuskun a sisiuha.
S.PHON: mail~ɬuskun a ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 他們對著在一起的青蛙行禮.
They take a bow to the frogs being together.

S.FORM: uninang.
S.PHON: uninaŋ.
S.FORM: uninang.
S.PHON: uninaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 感謝.
Thank you!

S.FORM: mihumisang.
S.PHON: mix~χumisaŋ.
S.FORM: mihumisang.
S.PHON: mix~χumisaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 很高興認識你.
Nice to see you.

S.FORM: namuhnata maisinin mapasadu.
S.PHON: namux~χnata maiɕinin mapasadu.
S.FORM: namuhnata maisinin mapasadu.
S.PHON: namux~χnata maiɕinin mapasadu.
S.TRANSL: 我們以後再見.
See you later.
